posts.author: zsmith (Zach Smith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Additional notification options in the notify automation action.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to be able to have a standard automation that notifies whoever the board owner is on the board the automation lives on.
A few benefits to having this option:

  1. Automations in board templates wouldn’t need to be manually updated when a board is created using the template.
  2. As ownership changes on a board, the automations don’t need to be actively managed.

There is already a way to specify board ownership so I would think allowing us to specify those people in a notification would be fairly straight forward.
